purpose: Fetch-store pipeline for all source types: owns the Fetcher interface, Service struct, and two parallel refresh paths (Telegram/generic Source)

cross_scope_touchpoints.surface: reads channel list, sync state, and writes messages and updated sync state
consumes source.Source interface and source.Registry for generic source refresh path
opens a real SQLite storage.Store for integration-style test fixtures and result verification
uses source.NewRegistry, source.SourceMessage, and the Source interface in source-based test cases
creates rss.NewRSSSource for RSS integration test
creates reddit.NewRedditSource for Reddit integration test
creates hackernews.NewHNSource for HackerNews integration test

invariants: Deduplication is entirely delegated to the DB UNIQUE constraint on Messages; if Create returns an error it is silently skipped regardless of cause — storage errors during message write are indistinguishable from duplicates
risks: RefreshFiltered ignores its sourceNames argument entirely and delegates to RefreshAll — callers expecting selective refresh get a full refresh silently
No retry or rate-limit handling; transient Telegram API errors propagate immediately to the caller as fetch errors accumulated in RefreshResult.Errors
patterns: Two parallel refresh paths exist: Fetcher-based (Telegram MTProto, integer message IDs) and Source-based (generic interface, opaque string checkpoints). RefreshAllSources delegates to RefreshSources which calls src.FetchMessages rather than the Fetcher.
Tests use a real storage.Open against a temp-dir SQLite DB rather than a mock store — integration-style coverage that validates the full fetch→store→syncstate cycle
